messages.content: Please help. How should I start teaching stay? Please make it easy to follow.

{"command": "stay", "difficulty": "intermediate", "steps": ["Take one small step back", "Pause for one second before moving", "Return to your dog before rewarding", "Ask your dog to sit first"], "common_mistake": "Increasing distance too quickly", "session_length_minutes": 6, "reward_tip": "Use calm praise and steady body language"}
Please help. How should I start training down? Please make it easy to follow.

{"command": "down", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Start with the treat near your dog's nose", "Lower the treat slowly to the floor", "Mark the full down position", "Guide the dog forward and down with the lure"], "common_mistake": "Trying to force the dog down physically", "session_length_minutes": 6, "reward_tip": "Keep repetitions calm and patient"}
I want a simple method. How can I teach a reliable down? Please make it easy to follow.

{"command": "down", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Lower the treat slowly to the floor", "Wait for elbows to reach the ground", "Start with the treat near your dog's nose", "Mark the full down position"], "common_mistake": "Rewarding a partial crouch", "session_length_minutes": 5, "reward_tip": "Use a smooth hand motion toward the floor"}
Help me teach my dog the sit cue Short sessions work best for us.

{"command": "sit", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Wait for the dog's bottom to lower", "Hold a treat close to your dog's nose", "Mark the sit with praise or a click", "Repeat in short sessions"], "common_mistake": "Using a treat lure that moves too fast", "session_length_minutes": 3, "reward_tip": "Pair food rewards with calm praise"}
I’m working with a young dog. Train stay command for my dog I want beginner-friendly steps.

{"command": "stay", "difficulty": "intermediate", "steps": ["Ask your dog to sit first", "Hold your palm out and say stay", "Increase time and distance gradually", "Take one small step back"], "common_mistake": "Increasing distance too quickly", "session_length_minutes": 5, "reward_tip": "Use calm praise and steady body language"}
I’m working with a young dog. How should I start training sit? I want beginner-friendly steps.

{"command": "sit", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Mark the sit with praise or a click", "Reward immediately when seated", "Repeat in short sessions", "Wait for the dog's bottom to lower"], "common_mistake": "Training when the dog is overexcited", "session_length_minutes": 6, "reward_tip": "Reward within one second of the sit"}
I want a simple method. Teach my dog to hold position Short sessions work best for us.

{"command": "stay", "difficulty": "intermediate", "steps": ["Ask your dog to sit first", "Take one small step back", "Return to your dog before rewarding", "Hold your palm out and say stay"], "common_mistake": "Adding distractions too early", "session_length_minutes": 7, "reward_tip": "Keep the first repetitions very short"}
Can you explain how to train attention? I want beginner-friendly steps.

{"command": "watch me", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Wait quietly for eye contact", "Build duration slowly over time", "Mark the moment your dog looks at you", "Reward immediately for attention"], "common_mistake": "Asking for too much duration at the start", "session_length_minutes": 2, "reward_tip": "Reward the first quick glances at you"}
I’m working with a young dog. Teach my dog to hold position Keep it simple.

{"command": "stay", "difficulty": "intermediate", "steps": ["Ask your dog to sit first", "Take one small step back", "Return to your dog before rewarding", "Hold your palm out and say stay"], "common_mistake": "Skipping the return-and-reward step", "session_length_minutes": 8, "reward_tip": "Use calm praise and steady body language"}
I want a simple method. Show me how to build focus with my dog I want beginner-friendly steps.

{"command": "watch me", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Reward immediately for attention", "Wait quietly for eye contact", "Say the cue watch me", "Build duration slowly over time"], "common_mistake": "Holding the treat too far from your face", "session_length_minutes": 3, "reward_tip": "Keep the treat close to your face at first"}
I’m training at home. Help me train eye contact with my dog

{"command": "watch me", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Reward immediately for attention", "Build duration slowly over time", "Hold a treat near your eyes", "Wait quietly for eye contact"], "common_mistake": "Waiting too long to reward eye contact", "session_length_minutes": 4, "reward_tip": "Keep the treat close to your face at first"}
Please help. Train the down command Please make it easy to follow.

{"command": "down", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Mark the full down position", "Start with the treat near your dog's nose", "Lower the treat slowly to the floor", "Reward as soon as the dog lies down"], "common_mistake": "Rewarding a partial crouch", "session_length_minutes": 5, "reward_tip": "Use soft treats the dog can eat quickly"}
I’m training at home. Help me train eye contact with my dog Please make it easy to follow.

{"command": "watch me", "difficulty": "beginner", "steps": ["Say the cue watch me", "Wait quietly for eye contact", "Build duration slowly over time", "Reward immediately for attention"], "common_mistake": "Waiting too long to reward eye contact", "session_length_minutes": 4, "reward_tip": "Use high-value treats to build focus"}
